Interface INetworkDiagramInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control the network diagram information.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("CFDA65A6-1EC0-4D06-AA07-5D462F25A62D")]
public interface INetworkDiagramInfo

Properties

The network diagram access right level.

esriDiagramAccessType Access { get; }

Property Value

esriDiagramAccessType
